---
title: "Broken Solution (for testing)"
author: "STAT-101"
format: html
---

# Intentionally Broken R Code

## Chunk that should pass

```{r good-chunk}
x <- 1 + 1
cat("Result:", x, "\n")
```

## Chunk with undefined variable

```{r undefined-var}
# This references a variable that doesn't exist
result <- nonexistent_variable + 1
cat("This should not print\n")
```

## Chunk with bad function call

```{r bad-function}
fake_function_xyz(1, 2, 3)
```

## Chunk that should still pass

```{r final-good}
summary(iris)
```
